notes: Felicia has the effect of four built-in Eternal Seals, allowing her to reach level 40 despite starting in the promoted Maid class.
Recruit Mozu by talking to her with Corrin in Paralogue 1.
Mozu begins with Aptitude, which adds 10% to every growth rate. The personal growth values shown above exclude this skill bonus.
Mozu cannot access Apothecary, but she still reaches Merchant through Villager and can access Mechanist through a Ninja seal grant.
In Conquest Chapter 16, spare Shura to recruit him; killing him instead awards Boots.
In Revelation Chapter 15, recruit Shura by talking to him with Corrin.
Izana becomes recruitable after the Hot Spring reaches level 3 and My Castle refreshes. A completed map advances the refresh, but simply waiting for the real-time refresh also works.
Izana unlocks after Birthright Chapter 18 or Conquest Chapter 22; he is not locked to the next story chapter.

His joining level, deterministic stat gains, weapon proficiency, and learned class skills scale with story progress. Scaled stats use (individual growth rates + Onmyoji class growth rates) from the level 5 base stat block, with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Conquest has a tested level 7-to-15 schedule; exact later-recruitment milestones for Birthright and exact weapon-rank milestones remain unresolved.
Izana uses a castle-recruit autolevel system with Offspring Seal-esque level scaling, not the child unit Offspring Seal level table directly. The exact internal relationship remains unverified.
Izana is an NPC in Revelation and cannot be recruited there.

provenance.locator: Fire Emblem Fates > Prologue/Birthright/Conquest/Revelation > Chapter 5; Conquest departure

chapter5Carryover.note: Conquest restores Azura with the stats she had at the end of Chapter 5; her Chapter 9 inventory is a Vulnerary and Chest Key. Weapon-proficiency carryover is intentionally not asserted here.

His joining level, deterministic stat gains, weapon proficiency, and learned class skills scale with story progress. Scaled stats use (individual growth rates + Onmyoji class growth rates) from the level 5 base stat block, with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Conquest has a tested level 7-to-15 schedule; exact later-recruitment milestones for Birthright and exact weapon-rank milestones remain unresolved.

myCastleRecruitment.note: After Chapter 18 is complete, refresh My Castle by waiting for the real-time update or by completing any map.

autoLevel.note: Birthright's earliest Level 5 stat block is independently corroborated. At each scaled level, add (Izana's individual growth rates + Onmyoji class growth rates) multiplied by levels gained, then round each resulting stat to the nearest integer with exact 0.5 results rounded up. Later Birthright chapter milestones still need direct testing; the child unit Offspring Seal level table does not apply directly.

autoLevel.note: Controlled Conquest testing found two deterministic levels per completed story chapter after Chapter 22, capped at level 15. Difficulty does not affect these gains, and the schedule differs from the child unit Offspring Seal level table.

sources.location: User-provided Fire Emblem Fates gameplay verification
sources.notes: After the relevant route chapter and a level 3 Hot Spring, Izana joins when My Castle refreshes. Waiting for the real-time update works; completing a map is another way to advance the refresh.

sources.title: Flora/Izana level scaling??? - controlled Conquest testing
sources.notes: Player testing records the full Conquest level schedule, deterministic average-growth stat gains, automatic class skills, and a level 15 cap.

sources.title: FE14 parent-generation unit evaluation - Pegasus Knight
sources.notes: Japanese community reference identifying Izana, Flora, and Fuga as My Castle recruits whose joining levels rise with later recruitment. Its listed Conquest Izana minimum conflicts with controlled testing.

sources.title: Paragon FE14 extracted-data schemas
sources.notes: The CastleJoin and Chapter schemas expose route-specific castle recruitment chapters and chapter-level Offspring Seal scaling fields. Their coexistence supports describing the castle system as Offspring Seal-esque level scaling, but does not prove that castle recruits use the child unit Offspring Seal routine.

sources.title: Hoshidan Characters - Other Data - Serenes Forest
sources.notes: Izana's footnote states that later recruitment raises his weapon ranks and level, with level determining how many class skills he has.
